controls.name: Information Security in Supplier Relationships
controls.breach_relevance: Anodot had no formal policy governing credential protection for customer integrations
controls.question: Do you have a formal security policy governing how you handle customer integrations and credentials?

controls.name: Addressing Security Within Supplier Agreements
controls.breach_relevance: No breach notification SLA existed. Rockstar found out 7 days after compromise via dark web post
controls.question: Does your customer contract include breach notification timelines and token management requirements?

controls.name: Managing Security in the ICT Supply Chain
controls.breach_relevance: Anodot own infrastructure was compromised first indicating weak internal supply chain security
controls.question: Do you conduct security assessments of your own sub-processors and infrastructure components?

controls.name: Monitoring and Review of Supplier Services
controls.breach_relevance: Rockstar had no real time visibility into Anodot connector health or query behavior
controls.question: Do customers have real time visibility into your service health and integration activity?

controls.name: Information Security for Use of Cloud Services
controls.breach_relevance: No cloud service security requirements existed in the Anodot contract covering Snowflake access
controls.question: Are cloud service security requirements formally defined in customer agreements?

controls.name: Information Access Restriction
controls.breach_relevance: Anodot tokens had warehouse wide access when only specific schema access was needed
controls.question: Are authentication tokens scoped to least privilege access per schema only?

controls.name: Secure Authentication
controls.breach_relevance: Static long lived tokens were extracted and reused by attackers with no expiry
controls.question: Are tokens short lived, rotated regularly, and protected by MFA or IP restrictions?

controls.name: Monitoring Activities
controls.breach_relevance: No anomaly detection existed on Snowflake query behavior allowing silent exfiltration for 10 days
controls.question: Do you have anomaly detection covering outbound data queries from your platform?

controls.name: Use of Cryptography
controls.breach_relevance: Tokens were stored in a way that allowed extraction suggesting weak or absent encryption at rest
controls.question: Are authentication tokens encrypted at rest using current cryptographic standards?
